/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -DINCLUDE_TEMPLATES  -W  -Wall  -Wno-unused  -Wextra  -Wno-variadic-macros  -DNDEBUG  -DINCLUDE_TEMPLATES  -W  -Wall  -Wno-unused  -Wextra  -Wno-variadic-macros  -DNDEBUG  -shared -Wl,-soname,libOpenMeshCore.so.11.0 -o ../../../../../Build/lib/libOpenMeshCore.so.11.0 CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/BinaryHelper.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/IOManager.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/OMFormat.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/reader/BaseReader.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/reader/OBJReader.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/reader/OFFReader.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/reader/OMReader.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/reader/PLYReader.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/reader/STLReader.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/writer/BaseWriter.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/writer/OBJWriter.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/writer/OFFWriter.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/writer/OMWriter.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/writer/PLYWriter.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/writer/STLWriter.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/IO/writer/VTKWriter.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/Mesh/ArrayKernel.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/Mesh/BaseKernel.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/Mesh/PolyConnectivity.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/Mesh/TriConnectivity.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/System/omstream.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/Utils/BaseProperty.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/Utils/Endian.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/Utils/PropertyCreator.cc.o CMakeFiles/OpenMeshCore.dir/Utils/RandomNumberGenerator.cc.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib"
